name: Herforte Lotion Spray (to fill in gaps and treat alopecia)

Indicated for: *Diffuse hair fall. *Adjuvant therapy for alopecia areata. *Controls split ends, roughness, dryness& brittleness of hair. *Controls dandruff. Application: Spray onto wet or dry hair& scalp “6 pump” suitable amount then massage& style as usual, once or twice daily preferably start from the forehead to back of the head in a circular movement or as directed by physician. Package: 120 ml.
ingredients: Jojoba Oil Extract, Garlic Oil Extract, Nigella, Rosemary, Caffeine, Thyme Oil, Salicylic acid, Panthenol, Aloe Vera, Vitamin E
